title: Final Stage
subtitle: Ready for delivery
description: You have reached the final stage of pregnancy. Labor may begin at any time, and staying calm, prepared, and supported is essential. Focus on rest, awareness of body signals, and immediate response readiness.
what_to_expect: Active signs of labor such as regular contractions or pressure
Heightened awareness of body signals and changes
Immediate need for readiness and response
daily_safety_tips: Keep all essentials, documents, and contacts ready at all times
Stay close to your healthcare provider or facility
Avoid any unnecessary physical effort or movement
movement_guidelines: Limit movement to essential and assisted activity only
Avoid any activity that causes discomfort or strain
Use full support or assistance for all movement
environmental_awareness: Ensure surroundings are calm, safe, and easily accessible
Keep pathways clear for quick and safe movement
Continue avoiding exposure to harmful chemicals or smoke
travel_safety: Avoid travel unless required for reaching a healthcare facility
Ensure immediate access to transport if needed
Maintain maximum comfort and support during movement
important_note: Staying prepared and responding promptly to body signals is critical at this stage.
reassurance: You are ready, and with proper support and awareness, you can move forward with confidence.
medical_disclaimer: Consult a qualified healthcare professional before starting or modifying any physical activity.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining consistent meals and minimal activity supports stable blood sugar levels during this stage.
movement_guidelines: Engage in minimal gentle movement only when necessary
Maintain consistent meal timing and hydration
Monitor your body's response to reduced activity
diabetes.safety_focus: Watch for fatigue, dizziness, or changes in energy levels.
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced routines support stability and comfort.

anemia.personalized_description: Fatigue may be at its peak, requiring maximum rest and minimal exertion.
movement_guidelines: Limit activity strictly to essential needs
Take continuous rest and avoid strain
anemia.safety_focus: Be aware of dizziness, weakness, or breathlessness.
anemia.reassurance: Rest and minimal effort help maintain comfort.

hypertension.personalized_description: Maintaining a calm and controlled environment supports stable blood pressure.
movement_guidelines: Avoid stressful or physically demanding situations
Engage in minimal and controlled movement
hypertension.safety_focus: Be mindful of stress levels and physical strain.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady approach supports well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent routines and minimal activity support metabolic balance during this final phase.
movement_guidelines: Maintain a steady and minimal activity pattern
thyroid.safety_focus: Be aware of unusual fatigue or energy fluctuations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining full readiness, minimizing movement, and prioritizing rest is critical.
priority_guidelines: Avoid unnecessary physical effort or strain
Maintain minimal and essential movement only
Take continuous rest and stay hydrated
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Careful rest and awareness support comfort and safety.
